description: Workshop Web HTTPS server with HTML

scripts.start: npm i & npm update & node src/app.mjs
scripts.bonus: npm i & npm update & node src/app-bonus.mjs
scripts.dev: npm i & npm update & node --watch src/app.mjs
scripts.bonus:dev: npm i & npm update & node --watch src/app-bonus.mjs
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n server,bonus -c blue,green "npm run start" "npm run start:b"
scripts.all:dev: concurrently -n server,bonus -c blue,green "npm run start:dev" "npm run start:b:dev"

author: Glodie Tshimini
